falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes below 4950 on any daily session in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break below the August 2024 lows invalidates the bottom pattern match; the 79% similarity to bottom_2024_aug requires holding above that structural support level

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for two consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The blowoff score of 40 implies controlled volatility; sustained VIX above 35 indicates panic-driven selling rather than the capitulation-then-stabilization dynamic of the August 2024 bottom pattern

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.80% while SPX is below 5100
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Flight-to-safety bid in bonds concurrent with weak equities signals recession fear, not the growth-scare-recovery dynamic that defined August 2024; this breaks the pattern's macro regime alignment

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
